name: General Purpose (GP) Rating
description: Pre-sea rating course for general purpose ratings (deck & engine).

name: Certificate Course for Maritime Catering (CCMC)
description: Pre-sea catering course for ship cooks and stewards.

name: Diploma in Nautical Science (DNS)
description: One-year pre-sea diploma leading to B.Sc. Nautical Science.

name: B.Sc. Nautical Science
description: Degree programme for deck officer cadets.

name: Graduate Marine Engineering (GME)
description: One-year pre-sea course for degree engineers leading to MEO Class IV.

name: B.Tech / B.E. Marine Engineering
description: Four-year marine engineering degree.

name: Electro-Technical Officer (ETO)
description: Pre-sea course for electro-technical officers.

name: Pre-Sea Training for Deck Cadets
description: Pre-sea training programme for deck cadets.

name: STCW Basic Safety Training
description: Mandatory STCW basic safety package (PST, FPFF, EFA, PSSR).

name: Personal Survival Techniques (PST)
description: STCW personal survival techniques.

name: Fire Prevention & Fire Fighting (FPFF)
description: STCW fire prevention and fire fighting.

name: Elementary First Aid (EFA)
description: STCW elementary first aid.

name: Personal Safety & Social Responsibility (PSSR)
description: STCW personal safety and social responsibility.

name: Security Training for Seafarers with Designated Security Duties (STSDSD)
description: Security training for designated security duties.

name: Advanced Fire Fighting (AFF)
description: Advanced fire fighting.

name: Medical First Aid (MFA)
description: Proficiency in medical first aid on board ship.

name: Medical Care (MEDICARE)
description: Proficiency in medical care on board ship.

name: Proficiency in Survival Craft & Rescue Boats (PSCRB)
description: Survival craft and rescue boat proficiency.

name: GMDSS General Operator Certificate (GOC)
description: Global Maritime Distress and Safety System operator course.

name: Radar Observer & ARPA
description: Radar navigation and ARPA simulator course.

name: ECDIS
description: Electronic Chart Display and Information System course.

name: Ship Security Officer (SSO)
description: Ship security officer course.

name: Oil & Chemical Tanker Cargo Operations (OCTCO)
description: Advanced oil and chemical tanker cargo operations.

name: Basic Training for Oil & Chemical / Gas Tanker
description: Tanker familiarization and basic tanker training.

name: Refresher PST (RPST)
description: Refresher personal survival techniques.

name: Refresher FPFF (RFPFF)
description: Refresher fire prevention and fire fighting.

name: MEO Class IV (Engineer Competency)
description: Marine Engineer Officer Class IV certificate of competency.

name: Certificate of Competency (Deck / Engine)
description: Post-sea competency and revalidation courses (Master, Chief Mate, 2nd Mate, Chief/Second Engineer, MEO Class III).
